info.title: Agentic API Gateway Action Group
info.description: Route to any application registered with the Agentic API Gateway. Two use cases: gatewayRetrieve finds the registered backend operations most relevant to a question (semantic search over the pgvector registry); gatewayInvoke calls a chosen operation through the generic HTTP proxy. The agent should call gatewayRetrieve first to discover a backendId + operationId, then gatewayInvoke with the required params.

post.summary: Retrieve candidate backend operations, or invoke one through the generic proxy.
post.description: useCase 'gatewayRetrieve' { query, topK? } returns candidate operations (backendId, operationId, method, path, summary, requiredParams, score). useCase 'gatewayInvoke' { backendId, operationId, ...params } calls that operation and returns a DispatchResult (data = response rows, meta = url/httpStatus).

useCase.description: The gateway use case to execute.

params.description: For gatewayRetrieve: { query, topK? }. For gatewayInvoke: { backendId, operationId, and the operation's path/query/body params }.

query.description: gatewayRetrieve: the natural-language request to find a backend operation for.

topK.description: gatewayRetrieve: max candidate operations to return (default 5).

backendId.description: gatewayInvoke: the registered backend to call (from a gatewayRetrieve result).

operationId.description: gatewayInvoke: the backend operation to call (from a gatewayRetrieve result).

200.description: Retrieved candidate operations, or the invoked operation's DispatchResult.
